Request Early Access

GST accounting software

GST-aware accounting entry preparation for Indian businesses.

Fastbooks helps prepare sales, purchase and expense entries with GST hints so accountants can review tax treatment before final approval.

Request Early Access Open GST calculator

GST review layer

Designed for review, not blind auto-posting.

Sales invoice hints

Prepare taxable value, GST amount and party details for review.

Purchase bill hints

Capture vendor, amount and GST split clues from bill scans and text inputs.

Accountant approval

Review HSN/SAC, ledger and GST treatment before entries become final.

Important positioning

GST compliance needs control.

Fastbooks should be positioned as a preparation and review layer. Do not claim automatic GST filing unless the product actually supports it end-to-end.
